productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Black Flip Flops
description: Classic American style incorporated into lifestyle footwear - that's what U.S. Polo Association's footwear is all about. This pair of flip flops has a soft, comfy footbed with enhanced fashion styling. We believe that every cosmopolitan man's closet needs one of these! UpperThick thong style leather straps with a toe separatorPadded footbed with embossed branding on the heelOutsoleTPU outsole with circular nubs all overFlip flop careWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
